title: Flyspeed (Creative Flight)
description: Instantly boost your creative flight up to 500x faster with /flyspeed! Fly smoother, build faster, and explore like never before. All client-side and lag-free.
body:
## 🚀 Flyspeed — The Ultimate Freedom Mod 🚀
### Client-Sided. Zero Lag.

Unleash your wings with 1x to 500x flight speed — go from gentle gliding to warp-speed hyperspace travel in seconds. Whether you’re building a mega city, terraforming entire continents, or just want to zoom past your friends like a god, Flyspeed gives you total control.

## 💨 Why Flyspeed?

- **Client-Sided** — Only you need it, works anywhere without bothering anyone else.

- **Performance Friendly** — Smooth as silk, even at insane speeds.

- **Ridiculously Fast** — 1x to 500x multiplier with /flyspeed <multiplier>

- **Perfect For:** Map building, creative projects, multiplayer fun, cinematic shots, exploration, and absolute power trips.

Once you try it, normal flight will feel like walking through honey.
Stop crawling. Start soaring.🦅💨
